commentbox-desc: Waxay ku darsataa sanduuq faallo bogag gaar ah
commentbox-intro: == Ku dar faallo... == Ma haysaa faallo ku saabsan boggan? Halkaan ku dar ama [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|action=edit}} wax ka beddel bogga si toos ah].
commentbox-name-explanation: <small>(Talo: Haddii aad [[Special:UserLogin|gasho akoonkaaga]], uma baahnid inaad halkan gacanta ku geliso magacaaga)</small>
commentbox-errorpage-title: Khalad ayaa dhacay marka la abuurayay faallada
